pi_items.source: Task description: 'It must have columns: Year, Month, TotalRevenue (sum of Total), InvoiceCount, and UniqueCustomers'
Task description: 'with columns: CustomerId (PK), FirstName, LastName, Email, Country, TotalSpent, InvoiceCount, FirstPurchaseDate, LastPurchaseDate, AvgInvoiceValue, CustomerSegment'
Task description: 'Assign CustomerSegment: High (TotalSpent >= 40.00), Medium (20.00 <= TotalSpent < 40.00), Low (TotalSpent < 20.00)'
Verified from GitHub repository - Chinook is an official, well-known sample database for educational and testing purposes
Direct inspection of Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite from official GitHub source
Direct inspection of Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite from official GitHub source
Query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate)) FROM Invoice; against official Chinook database
Query on official Chinook database for customers with SUM(Total) >= 40.0
Query on official Chinook database for customers with 20.0 <= SUM(Total) < 40.0
Query on official Chinook database for customers with SUM(Total) < 20.0 (all customers have invoices totaling >= 20.0)
Query: SELECT MIN(InvoiceDate), MAX(InvoiceDate) FROM Invoice;

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Chinook database, a well-known public sample database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) designed for educational and testing purposes. The database contains 59 customers and 412 invoices spanning from 2021-01-01 to 2025-12-22, with 60 distinct year-month combinations. When applying the customer lifetime value segmentation logic with thresholds of high (>=40.0), medium (20.0-39.99), and low (<20.0), the distribution is: 14 high-value customers, 45 medium-value customers, and 0 low-value customers (all active customers have total spending >= 20.0). All metadata specifications match the task description requirements: the view 'vw_monthly_revenue' should have columns Year, Month, TotalRevenue, InvoiceCount, and UniqueCustomers; the table 'customer_lifetime_value' should have 11 specified columns including CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email, Country, TotalSpent, InvoiceCount, dates, AvgInvoiceValue, and CustomerSegment.
